negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_1cd2d3bd-6198-467f-83c9-4b12e5af1235
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out through the windshield onto a quiet street intersection. The road stretches ahead, marked with white lines and stop lane markers painted on the asphalt. Two octagonal red "STOP" signs are situated on either side of the lane. Surrounding the intersection are trees with lush green foliage, casting shadows across the pavement. In the background, a large multi-story building with a mix of beige and reddish-brown tones stands prominently, suggesting it could be an office or institutional structure. The sky above is clear and blue, indicating a sunny day. The area around the intersection is landscaped with patches of grass and gravel, and there are a few streetlights visible along the sides of the road. A yellow traffic sign can also be seen further down the street. As the video progresses, the ego car is slowly approaching the intersection. The camera remains fixed, capturing the gradual advance of the vehicle towards the stop lane markers painted on the road. The surrounding environment remains largely unchanged, with the trees swaying slightly in the breeze and the large building in the background remaining static. The stop signs and streetlights continue to stand in their positions, and a white sedan can be seen approaching at the intersection from the opposite side of the ego vehicle. The overall scene conveys a sense of calm movement as the car navigates the intersection. By the final frame, the car has moved closer to the intersection, with the stop lines more prominent and the building still visible in the background.  A medium shot from the driver's perspective, capturing the approach to the intersection with a steady camera angle.
